evals.prompt: 我需要在 graphics_effect 项目中新增一个 posterize 滤镜效果，用来将图像色彩量化到指定级数。这个效果需要两个参数：levels（int，范围 2-256，默认 8）控制量化级数，intensity（float，范围 0.0-1.0，默认 1.0）控制效果强度。请帮我完成添加效果的全流程。
evals.expected_output: Complete posterize filter effect: .params.in with GEPosterizeShaderFilterParams struct (levels and intensity fields with min/max, preferring auto-generated PascalCase tags or key-value syntax when options are needed), POSTERIZE enum before MAX, .h/.cpp with GEShaderFilter base class in Rosen namespace, OnProcessImage + GetEffect with SkSL shader string, constructor reads params and clamps, BUILD.gn entry, gen tools run, reflection files include POSTERIZE tags, unit tests covering constructor + SetParam + OnProcessImage.
expectations: Agent recognizes the effect type as filter (not shader/mask/shape)

Agent writes .params.in with [[ge::params(type=POSTERIZE, name="Posterize")]] and prefers omitting name= on [[ge::prop]], using key-value syntax when min/max/cast_from are needed (still omitting name= within key-value)

Agent defines levels field with min=2, max=256 (using key-value syntax: [[ge::prop(min=2, max=256)]] auto-generates Posterize_Levels) and intensity field with min=0.0, max=1.0 (similarly [[ge::prop(min=0.0, max=1.0)]] auto-generates Posterize_Intensity)
Agent uses GEShaderFilter base class in Rosen namespace (not Drawing)
Agent adds POSTERIZE enum value before MAX in ge_filter_type.h
Agent implements .cpp with OnProcessImage method and GetEffect containing SkSL shader string (not just empty stub)
Agent constructor reads params and stores as member variables with clamping/validation
Agent .h file includes DECLARE_GEFILTER_TYPEFUNC macro
Agent adds .cpp path to BUILD.gn sources list alphabetically
Generated reflection files (ge_effects_params.h, ge_params_reflection) include POSTERIZE-related tags and setter methods
Agent writes unit tests covering: constructor with valid params, SetParam round-trip with clamping, GetEffect/OnProcessImage returns non-null
Agent does NOT use cast_from for any field where types match (int for int, float for float)
Agent does NOT add name= unnecessarily — even fields with min/max/cast_from can omit name= when auto-generation suffices

evals.prompt: 我已经写好了 sunset_gradient shader mask 的 .params.in 文件（在 evals/files/ge_sunset_gradient_shader_mask.params.in），但还没做其他步骤。请帮我检查这个 params.in 文件是否有问题，然后完成添加效果的剩余流程。
evals.expected_output: Agent reviews .params.in, detects issues (blendStrength missing [[ge::prop]], SUNSET_GRADIENT_* naming uses ALL_CAPS instead of PascalName auto-generation convention), fixes by preferring to omit name= and relying on auto-generation, adds [[ge::prop]] for blendStrength with auto-generated tag SunsetGradientMask_BlendStrength, handles topColor/bottomColor defaults (suggests adding explicit defaults or notes risk), then completes workflow: SUNSET_GRADIENT_MASK enum, .h/.cpp with GEShaderMask in Drawing namespace, BUILD.gn, gen tools, unit tests.
expectations: Agent detects that blendStrength has no [[ge::prop]] attribute and fixes it (prefer omitting name= so auto-generates SunsetGradientMask_BlendStrength)

Agent detects that SUNSET_GRADIENT_TOP_COLOR and SUNSET_GRADIENT_BOTTOM_COLOR use ALL_CAPS naming and fixes by removing explicit name= to let auto-generation produce PascalCase, or changes to PascalCase explicit names
Agent detects that topColor and bottomColor have no explicit default values and either adds defaults or flags this as a risk
Agent detects SUNSET_GRADIENT_DIRECTION uses old ALL_CAPS naming — since this field has cast_from+custom, it must use key-value syntax with name= omitted (auto-generates PascalCase tag)
Agent recognizes the effect type as mask (from .params.in content and directory)
Agent uses GEShaderMask base class in Drawing namespace (not Rosen)
Agent implements GenerateDrawingShader as the key virtual method for masks
Agent .h/.cpp files exist and have correct structure (constructor reads params, DECLARE_GEFILTER_TYPEFUNC)
Agent adds SUNSET_GRADIENT_MASK enum value before MAX
Generated reflection files include SUNSET_GRADIENT_MASK-related tags and setters
Agent writes unit tests covering: constructor with valid params, SetParam round-trip, GenerateDrawingShader returns non-null

evals.prompt: 我在 graphics_effect 项目里新增了一个 SDF diamond shape 效果，写好了 .params.in 文件（在 evals/files/ge_diamond_sdf_shader_shape.params.in.buggy），然后跑了 gen_metadata.py 和 gen_effect_header.py，接着 hb build 就报错：duplicate case value 'SDF_DIAMOND_SHAPE_PATH'。请帮我排查哪里有问题。
evals.expected_output: Agent diagnoses cast_from same-type bug on diamondPath (Drawing::Path field with cast_from="Drawing::Path"), removes cast_from and prefers omitting name= (auto-generates SDFDiamondShape_DiamondPath), also fixes other ALL_CAPS names (SDF_DIAMOND_HALF_SIZE → auto-generate or PascalCase SDFDiamondShape_HalfSize etc.), adds [[ge::prop]] on offset field with key-value syntax for cast_from+custom, keeps valid cast_from usages, re-runs gen tools.
expectations: Agent correctly diagnoses the root cause: cast_from="Drawing::Path" on a Drawing::Path field causes duplicate switch cases
Agent removes cast_from="Drawing::Path" from the diamondPath field and prefers omitting name= entirely (auto-generates SDFDiamondShape_DiamondPath in PascalCase)
Agent fixes SDF_DIAMOND_HALF_SIZE — prefers omitting name= with min=0.0 only, using key-value syntax: [[ge::prop(min=0.0)]] which auto-generates SDFDiamondShape_HalfSize
Agent fixes SDF_DIAMOND_CORNER_RADIUS similarly — [[ge::prop(min=0.0)]] auto-generates SDFDiamondShape_CornerRadius

Agent fixes SDF_DIAMOND_SHAPE_SCALE — since it has cast_from+custom, must use key-value: [[ge::prop(cast_from="std::pair<float,float>", custom="PairToVector2fTransformer")]] (name= omitted, auto-generates SDFDiamondShape_Scale)

Agent fixes offset field — since it has cast_from+custom, must use key-value: [[ge::prop(cast_from="std::pair<float,float>", custom="PairToVector2fTransformer")]] (name= omitted, auto-generates SDFDiamondShape_Offset)
Agent keeps the valid cast_from usage for offset and scale fields (std::pair → Vector2f with custom transformer)
Agent re-runs gen_metadata.py and gen_effect_header.py after the fix (or explicitly states this must be done)
Agent does NOT add cast_from without confirming it's needed for type conversion

evals.prompt: 我已经完成了 aurora_flow shader 效果的所有代码文件：.params.in、.h 和 .cpp 都已经写好放在对应的 include/effect/shader/ 和 src/effect/shader/ 目录下，BUILD.gn 也已经更新了。但我还没运行 gen_metadata.py 和 gen_effect_header.py，也没有写单元测试。请帮我完成添加效果需要的剩余部分。
evals.expected_output: Agent runs gen_metadata.py + gen_effect_header.py (order doesn't matter), verifies build passes, writes unit tests at test/unittest/ge_aurora_flow_shader_test.cpp covering constructor + SetParam + MakeDrawingShader, adds test to BUILD.gn, builds test target.
expectations: Agent runs both gen_metadata.py and gen_effect_header.py (order is not enforced)
Agent verifies build passes with hb build graphics_effect -i (or equivalent)
Agent writes unit test at test/unittest/ge_aurora_flow_shader_test.cpp
Agent adds test to test/unittest/BUILD.gn sources list
Agent builds test target with hb build graphics_effect -t (or equivalent)
Agent tests cover: constructor with valid params, SetParam round-trip, MakeDrawingShader produces shader effect

evals.prompt: 我要在 graphics_effect 中添加一个 diamond SDF shape 效果，用于支持菱形几何的 SDF 渲染。这个效果需要三个参数：halfSize（float，范围 0.0-无穷，默认 50.0）控制菱形半尺寸，cornerRadius（float，范围 0.0-无穷，默认 0.0）控制圆角半径，以及一个 offset（Vector2f）控制偏移。请帮我完成添加效果全流程。
evals.expected_output: Complete diamond SDF shape effect: .params.in with GESDFDiamondShapeParams struct (halfSize/cornerRadius with min=0.0 using key-value syntax, offset with auto-generated tag since no cast_from needed unless user requests), SDF_DIAMOND_SHAPE enum before MAX, .h/.cpp with GESDFShaderShape base class in Drawing namespace, GenerateDrawingShader + GetSDFShapeType + HasType methods, BUILD.gn entry, gen tools run, unit tests.
expectations: Agent recognizes the effect type as shape (not filter/shader/mask)
Agent uses GESDFShaderShape base class in Drawing namespace (not Rosen)

Agent writes .params.in with [[ge::params(type=SDF_DIAMOND_SHAPE, name="SDFDiamondShape")]] and prefers omitting name= on [[ge::prop]], using key-value syntax when min/max/cast_from are needed (still omitting name= within key-value when auto-gen suffices)
Agent defines halfSize with min=0.0 using key-value syntax: [[ge::prop(min=0.0)]] (auto-generates SDFDiamondShape_HalfSize), and cornerRadius similarly
Agent does NOT add cast_from on offset (Vector2f) unless user explicitly requests a different caller type
Agent adds SDF_DIAMOND_SHAPE enum value before MAX in ge_filter_type.h
Agent implements GenerateDrawingShader, GetSDFShapeType, and HasType as required methods for shapes
Agent .h includes DECLARE_GEFILTER_TYPEFUNC macro
Agent constructor reads params and stores as member variables
Agent adds .cpp path to BUILD.gn sources list alphabetically
Generated reflection files include SDF_DIAMOND_SHAPE-related tags and setters
Agent writes unit tests covering: constructor with valid params, SetParam round-trip, GenerateDrawingShader returns non-null, GetSDFShapeType returns correct type
Agent uses Drawing namespace for both class and params (shape-specific namespace convention)
